explanation: This command matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria for changing lock screen timeout via Powercfg. It uses the original syntax as described in the rule.
This command matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria for changing the AC standby timeout. It uses the alternative syntax with hyphens as described in the rule.
This command uses insertion of quotes after the /SETACVALUEINDEX flag, which is still parsed correctly by the program. It remains functionally equivalent to the original command.
This command adds an additional -standby-timeout-dc flag with the same value as the -standby-timeout-ac flag. It is functionally equivalent and still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command adds extra spaces after the command line arguments. It is functionally equivalent and still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses lowercase letters for the flag, which is still valid and matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
